mapper.select:
select cp.id, cp.create_time, cp.update_time, cp.name, cp.description, cp.type, cp.amount, cp.discount, cp.min_amount, cp.use_range, cp.target_id, cp.begin_time, cp.end_time, cp.is_used, cp.used_time from s_member_coupon cp where cp.deleted = 0 and cp.member_id = #{userId}
and cp.is_used = 0 and now() between cp.begin_time and cp.end_time
and cp.is_used = 1
and cp.is_used = 0 and now() > cp.end_time
order by cp.create_time desc
